title: Hardcoded API key and debug mode in production config
diff:
diff --git a/config.py b/config.py
--- a/config.py
+++ b/config.py
@@ -1,3 +1,8 @@
 import os
-DEBUG = os.environ.get("DEBUG", "false").lower() == "true"
-SECRET_KEY = os.environ.get("SECRET_KEY")
+DEBUG = True
+SECRET_KEY = "my-hardcoded-secret-key-2024"
+API_TOKEN = "sk-live-abc123def456"
+DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://user:admin123@localhost/db"

ground_truth.description: DEBUG=True in production exposes stack traces and debug info
Hardcoded API token — live credential exposed in source code
